Package org.springdoc.core.utils

Class ArrayUtils

java.lang.Object
org.springdoc.core.utils.ArrayUtils
public final class ArrayUtils extends Object
Utility methods for array operations.

Replaces methods from org.apache.commons.lang3.ArrayUtils. All methods are null-safe and follow commons-lang3 contracts.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static <T> T[]
    add(T[] array, T element)
    Copies the given array and adds the given element at the end.
    static <T> T[]
    addAll(T[] array1, T[] array2)
    Adds all the elements of the given arrays into a new array.
    static <T> boolean
    isEmpty(T[] array)
    Checks if an array is empty or null.
    static <T> boolean
    isNotEmpty(T[] array)
    Checks if an array is not empty and not null.
    static <T> T[]
    removeElement(T[] array, T element)
    Removes the first occurrence of the specified element from the array.
    static <T> T[]
    toArray()
    Create an empty array of the specified type.

  • Method Details

    • isEmpty

      public static <T> boolean isEmpty(T[] array)
      Checks if an array is empty or null.
      Type Parameters:
      T - the array component type
      Parameters:
      array - the array to check, may be null
      Returns:
      true if the array is empty or null

    • isNotEmpty

      public static <T> boolean isNotEmpty(T[] array)
      Checks if an array is not empty and not null.
      Type Parameters:
      T - the array component type
      Parameters:
      array - the array to check, may be null
      Returns:
      true if the array is not empty and not null

    • add

      public static <T> T[] add(T[] array, T element)
      Copies the given array and adds the given element at the end.
      Type Parameters:
      T - the component type of the array
      Parameters:
      array - the array to add the element to, may be null
      element - the element to add, may be null
      Returns:
      a new array containing the existing elements plus the new element, or a new array containing only the element if the input array is null

    • addAll

      public static <T> T[] addAll(T[] array1, T[] array2)
      Adds all the elements of the given arrays into a new array.
      Type Parameters:
      T - the component type of the arrays
      Parameters:
      array1 - the first array, may be null
      array2 - the second array, may be null
      Returns:
      a new array with all elements from both arrays

    • removeElement

      public static <T> T[] removeElement(T[] array, T element)
      Removes the first occurrence of the specified element from the array.
      Type Parameters:
      T - the component type of the array
      Parameters:
      array - the array to remove the element from, may be null
      element - the element to be removed, may be null
      Returns:
      a new array with the element removed, or the original array if the element is not found

    • toArray

      public static <T> T[] toArray()
      Create an empty array of the specified type.
      Type Parameters:
      T - the array component type
      Returns:
      an empty array
